pkgmetadata.longdescription: F3D is a fast and minimalist 3D viewer. It supports many file formats, from digital content to scientific datasets including animated glTF, STL, STEP, PLY, OBJ, FBX, Alembic, and many more. It can show meshes with a simple but efficient set of options and benefits from VTK rendering features such as raytracing, real time physically based rendering, postprocessing effects and more.

use.flag: Support for Alembic (.abc) files via media-gfx/alembic
Support for FBX, DAE, OFF, DXF, X and 3MF files via media-libs/assimp
Support for OpenEXR images via media-libs/openexr
Support for VTKHDF, ExodusII and NetCDF file formats
Support for STEP, IGES, BREP and XBF files via sci-libs/opencascade
Support for point cloud file formats via PDAL
Support for WebP images via media-libs/libwebp
